# Zachary Salem El Metennani

> Zachary Salem El Metennani — also known as Zack ElMetennani, Zack El Metennani,
> Zachary ElMetennani, and Zach Elmetennani — is a cybersecurity engineer,
> consultant, and researcher based in Chicago, Illinois, USA. He is the security
> lead at MSP Pentesting and the founder of VulnScanners.com, where he builds
> internet-facing security scanners. His personal site at https://zackelmet.github.io
> covers hacking tools, internet security research, and web development projects.

## About

- **Full name:** Zachary Salem El Metennani
- **Also known as:** Zack ElMetennani, Zack El Metennani, Zachary ElMetennani, Zachary El Metennani, Zach Elmetennani
- **Roles:** Security Lead at MSP Pentesting; Founder of VulnScanners.com
- **Focus:** Cybersecurity engineering, penetration testing, vulnerability management, security research, and web development
- **Location:** Chicago, Illinois, USA
- **Website:** https://zackelmet.github.io/

## Profiles

- X (Twitter): https://x.com/zkpx_
- GitHub: https://github.com/zackelmet
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/zachary-elmetennani/

## Projects

- [VulnScanners.com](https://vulnscanners.com/): Hosted, internet-facing security scanning tools (founded 2025).
- [MSP Pentesting](https://www.msppentesting.com/): Penetration testing firm where Zack serves as security lead.

## Posts

- [Game of Life](https://zackelmet.github.io/Posts/Game%20of%20Life/game-of-life.html): Interactive Conway's Game of Life with four trivial rules giving rise to gliders, oscillators, glider guns, and unbounded complexity; draw your own or drop in classic patterns.
- [Wave Functions](https://zackelmet.github.io/Posts/Wave%20Functions/wave-grid.html): Interactive particle grid driven by four real wave models — the wave equation, quantum |ψ|², Chladni plate vibrations, and Gerstner ocean waves.
- [The S&P 50 Web "Vulnerability" Report](https://zackelmet.github.io/Posts/SnP50report/SnP50report.html): Quantitative analysis of S&P 50 attack surfaces using passive scanning.
- [Cowrie Honeypot — 4 Weeks of Data](https://zackelmet.github.io/Posts/Honeypot/honeypot%204%20week%20update.html): ~9,000 connection attempts collected over four weeks.
- [Cowrie Honeypot Analysis](https://zackelmet.github.io/Posts/Honeypot/honeypot.html): SSH-only honeypot on AWS EU (Stockholm) analyzing real attack traffic.
- [InfiniteMath](https://zackelmet.github.io/Posts/Infinite%20Math/infinite-math.html): A forever-growing site (https://infinitemath.vercel.app) that reveals a new beautiful, true math equation every day.
- [Recursive Tree](https://zackelmet.github.io/Posts/Recursive%20Tree/): Generative JavaScript art.
- [Vulnerability Management](https://zackelmet.github.io/Posts/VulnManagement/VulnManagement.html): Methods and strategies for managing vulnerabilities.
